title: Payroll software Kenya: how to choose (the criteria that actually matter)
excerpt: A buyer-side criteria guide for choosing payroll software in Kenya — statutory compute, M-Pesa-native disbursement, casual-pay handling, accounting integration, cost transparency, support SLAs, audit controls, multi-country scalability, and red flags. Not a ranking; criteria only.
meta_title: Payroll software Kenya — how to choose (criteria, not a ranking)
meta_description: The buyer criteria that actually predict success when choosing payroll software in Kenya: statutory compute, M-Pesa disbursement, casual pay, integrations, cost, support.
